columns.name: KontrollorRecno
columns.description: Unique record identifier for the Kontrollor

columns.name: Navn
columns.description: Full name of the Kontrollor

columns.name: Fornavn
columns.description: First name of the Kontrollor

columns.name: Postnr
columns.description: Postal code associated with the Kontrollor’s address

columns.name: Adresse
columns.description: Street address of the Kontrollor

columns.name: Epost
columns.description: Email address of the Kontrollor

columns.name: Telefon1
columns.description: First telephone number of the Kontrollor

columns.name: Telefon2
columns.description: Second telephone number of the Kontrollor

columns.name: Startet
columns.description: Date when the Kontrollor started their role

columns.name: Sluttet
columns.description: Date when the Kontrollor ended their role

columns.name: Autoristert
columns.description: Flag indicating if the Kontrollor is authorized

columns.name: RegDato
columns.description: Date when the Kontrollor was registered

columns.name: RegBruker
columns.description: User who registered the Kontrollor

columns.name: SistEndrDato
columns.description: Date when the Kontrollor’s record was last modified

columns.name: SistEndrBruker
columns.description: User who last modified the Kontrollor’s record

columns.name: SistAutorisert
columns.description: Date when the Kontrollor’s authorization was last confirmed

columns.name: Brukerid
columns.description: Unique identifier for the user associated with the Kontrollor

columns.name: Fylke
columns.description: County where the Kontrollor is registered

columns.name: FoedselsAar
columns.description: Year of birth of the Kontrollor

columns.name: FastAnsatt
columns.description: Flag indicating if the Kontrollor is a full-time employee

columns.name: Engfrae
columns.description: English name of the Kontrollor (if applicable)

columns.name: Passord
columns.description: Password associated with the Kontrollor’s account

columns.name: Tidspunkt
columns.description: Timestamp of a specific event related to the Kontrollor

columns.name: Opprettet
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created

columns.name: FeilForsokTeller
columns.description: Number of failed login attempts for the Kontrollor’s account

columns.name: FeilForsokTid
columns.description: Timestamp of the last failed login attempt

columns.name: Informert
columns.description: Flag indicating if the Kontrollor has been notified about a specific event

columns.name: SistInnlogget
columns.description: Timestamp of the last login by the Kontrollor

columns.name: Komentar
columns.description: Additional comments or notes about the Kontrollor
